cases.title: Valid work-units.json with a kind:verify unit passes the validator
preconditions: schema/work-units.schema.json exists and is committed
A validateWorkUnits export and ajv 8.20.0 are available

steps.instruction: Construct a well-formed envelope { $schema, schemaVersion: "1.0.0", specSlug: "testbench", units: [ a feature unit WU-003 with implements, and a kind:"verify" unit WU-009 with depends_on:[WU-003], covers:[WU-003], implements.test_case_ids:[TC-050, TC-051] ] }
Call validateWorkUnits(envelope)

observations.expected: Result is { ok: true } with no errors
Parsed units contains exactly WU-003 and WU-009

cases.title: E2E: load a spec's work-units.json, validator accepts the valid file and rejects an invalid copy
preconditions: schema/work-units.schema.json is committed; validateWorkUnits is exported
A fixture .specifications/testbench/work-units.json (valid) and a malformed copy exist

steps.instruction: Read the valid work-units.json and JSON.parse it
Pass the parsed object to validateWorkUnits()

observations.expected: Returns { ok: true, data }; data.specSlug is "testbench"; data.units is a non-empty array

steps.instruction: Read the malformed copy (schemaVersion removed) and pass it to validateWorkUnits()

observations.expected: Returns { ok: false, errors } referencing the missing schemaVersion field
No exception is thrown; a discriminated result object is returned

cases.title: Envelope missing schemaVersion is rejected with a field-named error
preconditions: validateWorkUnits is available

steps.instruction: Construct a valid envelope but omit the schemaVersion key entirely
Call validateWorkUnits(envelope)

observations.expected: Returns { ok: false } with a non-empty errors array
At least one error message contains "schemaVersion"

cases.title: kind:verify unit missing implements.test_case_ids is rejected
preconditions: validateWorkUnits is available

steps.instruction: Construct an envelope with a kind:"verify" unit whose implements object omits test_case_ids
Call validateWorkUnits(envelope)

observations.expected: Returns { ok: false }; an error identifies implements.test_case_ids or the path to the missing field

cases.title: Unit with an unrecognised extra field is rejected (strict mode)
preconditions: validateWorkUnits is available
The schema rejects additionalProperties

steps.instruction: Construct a valid unit and add an extra key "owner":"alice" not in the schema
Call validateWorkUnits(envelope containing this unit)

observations.expected: Returns { ok: false }; errors mention the unexpected key

cases.title: Regenerating the schema produces bytes identical to the committed schema/work-units.schema.json
preconditions: schema/work-units.schema.json is committed
The generate-schema renderer is importable

steps.instruction: Render the schema from the source for the work-units artifact to a string
Read the committed schema/work-units.schema.json and compare to the rendered string

observations.expected: The two strings are byte-for-byte identical (no drift)

cases.title: CI pr-check fails when schema/work-units.schema.json diverges from its source
preconditions: pr-check runs generate:schema followed by git diff --exit-code schema/

steps.instruction: Manually edit schema/work-units.schema.json (e.g. change a property type) without regenerating
Run npm run generate:schema then git diff --exit-code schema/

observations.expected: Exit code is non-zero (drift detected)
The diff references schema/work-units.schema.json

cases.title: A unit with a Jira tracker reference validates (tracker-agnostic envelope)
preconditions: validateWorkUnits is available
tracker.system accepts github | ghe | jira

steps.instruction: Construct a unit with tracker { system:"jira", ref:"ROUBO-42", url:"https://jira.example.com/browse/ROUBO-42", blocked_by_refs:[] }
Call validateWorkUnits(envelope)

observations.expected: Returns { ok: true }; the Jira system value is accepted

cases.title: Gate state is PASSED when every gating case result is passed
preconditions: Gate WU-040 gating set is TC-019 (L1), TC-020 (L2), TC-024 (L1, e2e_flow)
test-results.json planHash matches the current planHash
All three gating cases have derivedStatus: passed with no statusOverride

steps.instruction: Evaluate gate WU-040 against results where TC-019, TC-020, TC-024 are all passed

observations.expected: Gate state evaluates to PASSED
The unresolved cases list is empty

cases.title: Gate state is FAILED when one gating case result is failed
preconditions: Gate WU-040 gating set is TC-019, TC-020, TC-024; planHash matches
TC-019 derivedStatus is failed; TC-020 and TC-024 are passed

steps.instruction: Evaluate gate WU-040 where TC-019 is failed

observations.expected: Gate state evaluates to FAILED
TC-019 appears in the unresolved cases list

cases.title: Gate state is PENDING when one gating case is not_started
preconditions: Gate WU-040 gating set is TC-019, TC-020, TC-024; planHash matches
TC-020 derivedStatus is not_started; TC-019 and TC-024 are passed

steps.instruction: Evaluate gate WU-040 where TC-020 is not_started

observations.expected: Gate state evaluates to PENDING
TC-020 appears in the unresolved cases list

cases.title: Gate state is PENDING when a gating case is absent from caseResults
preconditions: Gate WU-040 gating set is TC-019, TC-020, TC-024; planHash matches
TC-024 has no entry in caseResults; TC-019 and TC-020 are passed

steps.instruction: Evaluate gate WU-040 against results that contain no entry for TC-024

observations.expected: Gate state evaluates to PENDING (not PASSED)
TC-024 appears in the unresolved list as absent

cases.title: Gate state is PENDING when a gating case is marked orphaned (never reads as passed)
preconditions: Gate WU-040 gating set is TC-019, TC-020, TC-024; planHash matches
TC-024 derivedStatus is passed but is flagged orphaned; TC-019 and TC-020 are passed

steps.instruction: Evaluate gate WU-040 where TC-024 is flagged orphaned

observations.expected: Gate state evaluates to PENDING (orphaned never reads as passed)
TC-024 appears in the unresolved list with an orphaned indicator

cases.title: Gate state is STALE when results planHash does not match the current plan hash
preconditions: Gate WU-040 gating set is TC-019, TC-020, TC-024, all with derivedStatus passed
results planHash is 'abc123'; the current test-cases.json planHash is 'def456'

steps.instruction: Evaluate gate WU-040 with results planHash 'abc123' against a plan whose current hash is 'def456'

observations.expected: Gate state evaluates to STALE (not PASSED)
The stale signal is surfaced in the gate-state payload

cases.title: Gate evaluation uses effective status: statusOverride blocked overrides derivedStatus passed
preconditions: Gate WU-040 gating set is TC-019, TC-020, TC-024; planHash matches
TC-019 derivedStatus is passed but statusOverride is blocked; TC-020 and TC-024 are passed

steps.instruction: Evaluate gate WU-040 where TC-019 derivedStatus is passed and statusOverride is blocked

observations.expected: Gate state evaluates to FAILED (statusOverride takes precedence)
TC-019 effective status is blocked and it appears in the unresolved list

cases.title: Gating set includes L1, L2, and e2e_flow cases; L3 and L4 cases are excluded
preconditions: A gate with no explicit implements.test_case_ids override
The batch contains TC-019 (L1), TC-020 (L2), TC-024 (L1, e2e_flow), TC-031 (L3), TC-042 (L4)

steps.instruction: Inspect the derived gating set for the gate

observations.expected: TC-019, TC-020, and TC-024 are in the gating set
TC-031 (L3) and TC-042 (L4) are not in the gating set

cases.title: Non-passed gate payload lists unresolved TC ids and their covering slice units
preconditions: Gate WU-040 covers WU-031, WU-032, WU-033
Gating cases: TC-019 (covers WU-031), TC-020 (covers WU-032), TC-024 (covers WU-033)
planHash matches; TC-019 is failed; TC-020 and TC-024 are passed

steps.instruction: Request the gate-state payload for gate WU-040

observations.expected: Response includes state FAILED
Response includes an unresolvedCases array containing TC-019
The TC-019 entry includes coveringUnits referencing WU-031

cases.title: Gate evaluation is deterministic: identical inputs produce an identical GateState
preconditions: Gate WU-040 gating set is TC-019 (not_started), TC-020 (passed), TC-024 (passed); planHash matches

steps.instruction: Evaluate the gate once with the fixed results and record the GateState
Evaluate the gate a second time with the identical results and no intervening writes

observations.expected: The returned GateState is byte-for-byte identical to the first call
No side-effects (no writes, no differing logs) occur between the two calls

cases.title: E2E: marking all gating cases passed transitions the gate from PENDING to PASSED
preconditions: Gate WU-040 covers WU-031, WU-032, WU-033; gating set TC-019, TC-020, TC-024
planHash matches; all three gating cases are not_started; the Verify-a-batch screen is open

steps.instruction: Open the batch detail and locate the gate-state panel for WU-040

observations.expected: Gate badge shows PENDING
Unresolved list shows the three gating cases, each linked to its covering unit

steps.instruction: Mark the first gating case passed

observations.expected: It is removed from the unresolved list; the badge stays PENDING (two remain)

steps.instruction: Mark the second gating case passed

observations.expected: It is removed from the unresolved list; the badge stays PENDING (one remains)

steps.instruction: Mark the final gating case passed

observations.expected: The unresolved list is empty
The gate badge transitions to PASSED
No stale banner is shown (planHash already matched)

cases.title: Batches overview lists one gate per phase derived from milestone
preconditions: A project with three phases; each work unit has a milestone matching its phase
Phase 1 gate closed (#420); Phase 2 verifying (WU-040 gates WU-031/032/033); Phase 3 blocked

steps.instruction: Navigate to the verify-gate batches overview

observations.expected: Exactly three gate cards render, one per phase
Each card title matches its phase

steps.instruction: Inspect the Phase 2 card

observations.expected: Card lists WU-040 gating WU-031, WU-032, WU-033 and shows '3 gating cases'

steps.instruction: Inspect the Phase 3 card

observations.expected: Card shows status blocked with blocked_by WU-040

cases.title: Opening a gate in TestBench shows only the gate's gating subset, not the whole spec
preconditions: Phase 2 gate implements.test_case_ids is [TC-019, TC-020, TC-024]
The full spec test-cases.json contains many more cases (e.g. TC-001..TC-018)

steps.instruction: From the batches overview, open the Phase 2 gate in TestBench

observations.expected: The verify-a-batch screen opens scoped to Phase 2

steps.instruction: Count and read the cases shown

observations.expected: Exactly 3 cases are shown: TC-019, TC-020, TC-024
Cases outside the gating subset (e.g. TC-001, TC-010) do not appear

cases.title: Operator merges two phase batches into one gate
preconditions: Phase 2 gate covers WU-031/032/033 (cases TC-019, TC-020, TC-024)
Phase 3 gate covers WU-050, WU-051 (cases TC-030, TC-031); both pending

steps.instruction: Open the merge control for Phase 2 and select Phase 3 as the merge target, then confirm

observations.expected: A single combined gate card replaces the Phase 2 and Phase 3 cards
The combined gate's gating set is the 5 cases TC-019, TC-020, TC-024, TC-030, TC-031

steps.instruction: Open the merged gate in TestBench

observations.expected: All 5 gating cases are shown with no duplicates

cases.title: Operator splits a large phase batch into two gates
preconditions: Phase 2 gate covers WU-031..WU-034 (cases TC-019, TC-020, TC-024, TC-025); pending

steps.instruction: Open the split control on the Phase 2 card; assign WU-031/032 to split A and WU-033/034 to split B; confirm

observations.expected: Two gate cards replace the original Phase 2 card
Split A covers WU-031/032 (TC-019, TC-020); split B covers WU-033/034 (TC-024, TC-025)

steps.instruction: Verify the total gating case count across both new cards

observations.expected: Total is 4, matching the pre-split count, with no loss or duplication

cases.title: E2E: verifier opens the batches overview, picks Phase 2, verifies the subset, and signs off
preconditions: Three phases with milestone-aligned units; Phase 1 closed (#420)
Phase 2 gate verifying with implements.test_case_ids [TC-019, TC-020, TC-024]; Phase 3 blocked by WU-040

steps.instruction: Navigate to the batches overview

observations.expected: Three gate cards are shown: Phase 1 passed, Phase 2 verifying, Phase 3 blocked

steps.instruction: Click the Phase 2 gate card

observations.expected: TestBench opens scoped to Phase 2 with exactly TC-019, TC-020, TC-024

steps.instruction: Execute and mark TC-019, then TC-020, then TC-024 as passed

observations.expected: All three gating cases show passed; the sign-off action becomes active

steps.instruction: Sign off the Phase 2 batch

observations.expected: Sign-off is recorded; the overview shows Phase 2 as passed/closed
Phase 3's blocked state resolves now that its upstream gate has passed

cases.title: E2E: operator merges two batches then verifies and signs off the combined gate
preconditions: Phase 2 gate (TC-019, TC-020, TC-024) and Phase 3 gate (TC-030) exist, both pending
Operator has merge/split permissions

steps.instruction: Open the batches overview and merge the Phase 2 and Phase 3 gates; confirm

observations.expected: One combined gate card replaces the two; gating set is TC-019, TC-020, TC-024, TC-030

steps.instruction: Open the combined gate in TestBench and mark all 4 cases passed

observations.expected: All 4 gating cases show passed

steps.instruction: Sign off the combined batch

observations.expected: Sign-off succeeds; the combined gate shows passed/closed
No separate Phase 2 or Phase 3 gate cards remain

cases.title: A phase with no L1/L2/e2e gating cases yields an empty or clearly-elided batch
preconditions: A phase contains only L3/L4 work with no cases eligible for the gating set

steps.instruction: Open the batches overview and check whether the phase appears

observations.expected: The phase is either absent or shown as a card labelled 'no gating cases', never an unlabelled empty card

steps.instruction: If a card is shown, open it in TestBench

observations.expected: TestBench displays a clear 'no gating cases in scope' message, not cases from other phases

cases.title: Blocked gate card reflects its blocking work unit and clears when the blocker passes
preconditions: Phase 3 gate is blocked because WU-040 (Phase 2) has not been signed off

steps.instruction: Inspect the Phase 3 gate card on the overview

observations.expected: Card status is blocked, showing blocked_by WU-040

steps.instruction: Sign off the Phase 2 gate, then return to the overview

observations.expected: The Phase 3 card transitions from blocked to pending/ready
The blocked_by WU-040 annotation is removed

cases.title: Signing off a batch with at least one failing gating case is rejected
preconditions: Phase 2 gate cases: TC-019 and TC-020 passed; TC-024 marked failed

steps.instruction: Open the Phase 2 gate in TestBench and attempt to sign off the batch

observations.expected: Sign-off is unavailable or returns an error citing TC-024's failing result
The Phase 2 gate does not become passed

cases.title: Refuse bench start when enforcement is ON and the upstream verify gate has not passed
preconditions: WU-051 (Phase 3) declares WU-040 (Phase 2) as its upstream verify gate
enforceIssueDependencies is ON; WU-040's gate has not passed; an active integration plugin is reachable

steps.instruction: POST /api/projects/:projectId/benches with { workUnitId: 'WU-051' }

observations.expected: HTTP 409 is returned with errorCode GATE_BLOCKED
The reason identifies WU-040 as the blocking upstream gate
No bench workspace is created and no process is started

cases.title: Allow bench start when enforcement is ON and the upstream verify gate has passed
preconditions: WU-051 declares WU-040 as its upstream gate; enforceIssueDependencies is ON
WU-040's gate has PASSED; an active integration plugin is reachable

steps.instruction: POST /api/projects/:projectId/benches with { workUnitId: 'WU-051' }

observations.expected: HTTP 201 is returned with the new bench record
The bench workspace is created; no GATE_BLOCKED/GATE_INDETERMINATE error is present

cases.title: Allow bench start when enforcement is OFF regardless of upstream gate status
preconditions: WU-051 declares WU-040 as its upstream gate; enforceIssueDependencies is OFF
WU-040's gate has not passed

steps.instruction: POST /api/projects/:projectId/benches with { workUnitId: 'WU-051' }

observations.expected: HTTP 201 is returned; the bench is created and started
No gate-related error is present in the response

cases.title: E2E: verify the Phase 2 gate, it passes, then the previously-blocked Phase 3 unit can start
preconditions: WU-051 declares WU-040 as its upstream gate; enforceIssueDependencies is ON
WU-040's gate has not yet passed; an active integration plugin returns live gate state

steps.instruction: Attempt to start a bench for WU-051 before the Phase 2 gate has passed

observations.expected: HTTP 409 GATE_BLOCKED referencing WU-040

steps.instruction: Verify the Phase 2 batch so WU-040's gate transitions to passed (its tracker issue closes)

observations.expected: WU-040's gate status becomes passed/closed

steps.instruction: Retry starting a bench for WU-051

observations.expected: HTTP 201; the bench is created and running, with no gate-blocking error

cases.title: Fail closed when enforcement is ON and no integration plugin is active
preconditions: WU-051 declares WU-040 as its upstream gate; enforceIssueDependencies is ON
No integration plugin is active or connected

steps.instruction: POST /api/projects/:projectId/benches with { workUnitId: 'WU-051' }

observations.expected: HTTP 409 with errorCode GATE_INDETERMINATE
The reason indicates the gate state could not be determined (no active plugin)
No bench is created; the start is refused entirely

cases.title: Fail closed when enforcement is ON and the plugin blocking-read RPC times out
preconditions: WU-051 declares WU-040 as its upstream gate; enforceIssueDependencies is ON
The integration plugin RPC is stubbed to hang and never respond

steps.instruction: POST /api/projects/:projectId/benches with { workUnitId: 'WU-051' } and observe the timing

observations.expected: The server responds within approximately the 3s RPC timeout bound
HTTP 409 with errorCode GATE_INDETERMINATE; no bench is created

cases.title: Start path issues at most one blocking-read RPC bounded by a 3-second timeout
preconditions: WU-051 declares WU-040 as its upstream gate; enforceIssueDependencies is ON
The integration plugin is instrumented to count outbound RPC calls; WU-040's gate has not passed

steps.instruction: Reset the RPC counter and any cached gate state, then POST /api/projects/:projectId/benches with { workUnitId: 'WU-051' }

observations.expected: Exactly one outbound blocking-read RPC is recorded for this start request
The RPC carries a 3s timeout bound (observable via the stub or plugin logs)

steps.instruction: Inspect the RPC log for any additional gate-read RPCs during the same request

observations.expected: RPC count is exactly 1 for this start request

cases.title: Gate evaluation completes under 200ms p95 for a results file of several hundred cases
preconditions: A test-results.json with ~300 case results (mixed pass/fail) is prepared
The gate evaluator runs in-process (no external I/O during evaluation); a benchmark harness captures p95 over 100 runs

steps.instruction: Load the 300-case results into memory and run the gate evaluator 100 times, recording each duration

observations.expected: All 100 evaluations complete without error

steps.instruction: Compute the p95 latency over the 100 runs

observations.expected: p95 latency is below 200ms

cases.title: The direct assign path is also gated (not only bench-create)
preconditions: WU-051 declares WU-040 as its upstream gate; enforceIssueDependencies is ON
WU-040's gate has not passed; an existing unassigned bench is present

steps.instruction: POST /api/projects/:projectId/issues/WU-051/assign to assign WU-051 to the existing bench

observations.expected: HTTP 409 with errorCode GATE_BLOCKED
The assignment is not applied; the bench remains unassigned

cases.title: Gate transitions to passed and enables the close action when all gating cases pass
preconditions: A verify gate exists for WU-040 / issue #451 with all-but-one gating case passing
The active integration plugin can perform transitions; the gate's allowedTransitions exposes a done/close transition

steps.instruction: On the Verify-a-batch screen, observe the gate state and the 'Close gate & unblock Phase 3' button before the last case passes

observations.expected: The close button is disabled because at least one gating case has not passed

steps.instruction: Mark the final gating case passed

observations.expected: The gate state is shown as passed
The 'Close gate & unblock Phase 3' button becomes enabled

cases.title: Closing a passed gate closes its tracker issue via the integration plugin
preconditions: Gate WU-040 is passed; issue #451 is open; the plugin exposes a done/close transition; the close button is enabled

steps.instruction: Click 'Close gate & unblock Phase 3'

observations.expected: The button enters a loading state and is temporarily disabled

steps.instruction: After completion, inspect issue #451 via the integration plugin

observations.expected: Issue #451 is now closed/done in the tracker
The gate state in Roubo reads closed

cases.title: E2E: last gating case passes, gate closes #451, Phase 3 unblocks, a Phase 3 bench can start
preconditions: Gate WU-040 / #451 exists; Phase 3 units list WU-040 in depends_on and show Blocked
All gating cases except the final one have passed; the plugin allowedTransitions includes a close/done transition

steps.instruction: Open the Verify-a-batch screen and mark the final remaining gating case passed

observations.expected: The gate state changes to passed and the close button becomes enabled

steps.instruction: Click 'Close gate & unblock Phase 3' and wait for completion

observations.expected: The audit log records a close/transition entry referencing #451 and the plugin
The gate state reads closed

steps.instruction: Navigate to the batches overview and inspect the Phase 3 card

observations.expected: The Phase 3 card now shows Unblocked and no longer lists WU-040 as a blocker

steps.instruction: Start a new bench in Phase 3

observations.expected: The Phase 3 bench starts with no blocked-by error referencing the gate

cases.title: Gate close is routed through the plugin's applyTransition and audit-logged
preconditions: Gate WU-040 is passed with #451 open; the plugin exposes applyTransition and a done/close transition; the audit log is accessible

steps.instruction: Trigger gate closure via the close action
Inspect the bench audit log after completion

observations.expected: An audit entry records a privileged applyTransition broker call on issue #451 attributed to the active plugin
The recorded transition target corresponds to the done/close state from allowedTransitions

steps.instruction: Verify #451 directly in the tracker

observations.expected: Issue #451 is in the closed/done state

cases.title: Closing an already-closed gate is an idempotent no-op
preconditions: Gate WU-040 has already been closed; #451 is done; the Roubo gate state is closed

steps.instruction: Replay the gate-close request (re-POST the close endpoint)

observations.expected: Roubo returns a success or graceful 'already closed' response with no UI error
Issue #451 remains closed; no duplicate transition is applied
No second close entry is added to the audit log (idempotency preserved)

cases.title: When the plugin rejects the close transition, the error is surfaced and the gate is not left half-closed
preconditions: Gate WU-040 is passed with #451 open; the plugin is configured to reject the close transition (e.g. permission error)

steps.instruction: Click 'Close gate & unblock Phase 3'
Observe the result after the plugin rejects the transition

observations.expected: A clear error is surfaced (no raw stack trace)
The gate state remains passed (not partially advanced to closed)
Issue #451 remains open and Phase 3 remains Blocked (no premature unblock)

cases.title: A failed or pending gate is NOT closed and does not unblock the next batch
preconditions: Gate WU-040 is in a failed state (a gating case failed); #451 is open; Phase 3 is Blocked

steps.instruction: Observe the close button while the gate is failed

observations.expected: The close button is disabled

steps.instruction: Attempt to call the gate-close API directly while the gate is not passed

observations.expected: The API rejects with a 4xx (e.g. 409/422) indicating the gate is not in a closeable state
Issue #451 remains open and Phase 3 remains Blocked

cases.title: E2E: mark a gating case failed, capture notes, file a fix issue that blocks the gate, gate stays not-passable until resolved
preconditions: Gate WU-040 / #451 exists in a project on the github-com plugin; gating case TC-024 is not yet verified
The github-com 'create-issue' and 'add-blocking-link' capabilities are declared and consented

steps.instruction: Mark TC-024 failed

observations.expected: TC-024 transitions to failed and a panel opens with a Notes field and a 'File fix issue & block gate' action

steps.instruction: Enter notes describing the failure and click 'File fix issue & block gate'

observations.expected: A fix issue WU-041 / #452 is created in the tracker
The panel confirms 'WU-041 (#452) blocks WU-040 (#451)'

steps.instruction: Open the bench audit log

observations.expected: Two chronological entries are present: create-issue (WU-041/#452) and add-blocking-link, both attributed to github-com

steps.instruction: Attempt to pass the gate

observations.expected: The gate cannot pass; it is blocked by the open fix issue WU-041 (#452)

steps.instruction: Resolve (close) #452 in the tracker and re-verify TC-024 as passed

observations.expected: TC-024 becomes passed, the blocker clears, and the gate can now pass

cases.title: Filing a fix issue creates the tracker issue and records it as a gate blocker
preconditions: Gate WU-040 / #451 is open; TC-024 is failed with notes entered; the github-com plugin has the required consented capabilities

steps.instruction: Click 'File fix issue & block gate'

observations.expected: Fix issue WU-041 / #452 is created in the tracker
WU-041 is registered as a blocker on WU-040 and the relationship persists on refresh
The gate reads 'blocked by 1 open fix issue' and cannot pass

cases.title: Privileged create-issue and add-blocking-link calls are audit-logged with no secrets
preconditions: TC-024 is failed with notes; github-com 'create-issue' and 'add-blocking-link' are declared and consented
The bench audit log is accessible

steps.instruction: File a fix issue for TC-024
Fetch GET /api/projects/:projectId/benches/:id/audit-log?pluginId=github-com

observations.expected: Exactly two entries are returned (create-issue and add-blocking-link), both attributed to github-com, in chronological order
Neither entry contains a token, OAuth secret, or any credential substring
Each entry records plugin id, capability, timestamp, and the resulting issue reference

steps.instruction: Inspect the server log output for the filing request

observations.expected: No token or secret value appears in any log line for the create-issue or add-blocking-link operations

cases.title: An undeclared (unconsented) capability call is blocked by the privileged-broker guard
preconditions: A plugin is configured whose manifest does NOT declare the create-issue capability
TC-024 is failed; a request attempts fix-issue filing programmatically

steps.instruction: Attempt to invoke the create-issue broker call through the unconsented plugin (bypassing the UI consent check)

observations.expected: The privileged-broker guard rejects the call with a clear error (e.g. 403 / 'capability not declared')
No issue is created in the tracker
The rejection is recorded as a blocked attempt, not a successful action

cases.title: Evidence writes are scoped to the bench workspace; a path-escaping write is rejected
preconditions: TC-024 is failed with notes; the bench workspace root is known
A crafted evidence path attempts directory traversal outside the workspace

steps.instruction: Submit the filing payload with an evidence path of '../../outside-workspace/secrets.txt'

observations.expected: The resolveWithin barrier rejects the write with a path-escape error
No file is created at or outside the workspace boundary

steps.instruction: Resubmit with a valid in-workspace evidence path

observations.expected: The write succeeds within the workspace at the specified path

cases.title: Filing succeeds on a tracker that supports create-issue and add-blocking-link (GitHub)
preconditions: The github-com plugin has both create-issue and add-blocking-link declared and consented; TC-024 is failed with notes

steps.instruction: Click 'File fix issue & block gate'

observations.expected: Fix issue WU-041 / #452 is created in GitHub
A blocking link from #452 to #451 is registered
The UI confirms both the issue reference and the blocking-link

cases.title: Filing degrades with a clear message when the tracker lacks the blocking-link capability
preconditions: The active tracker plugin declares create-issue but NOT add-blocking-link; TC-024 is failed with notes

steps.instruction: Click 'File fix issue & block gate'

observations.expected: The fix issue is created (create-issue is available)
A clear non-silent message states the tracker does not support automatic blocking links and to add it manually (not a silent no-op)
The gate is held in a safe state and cannot pass until the fix is manually resolved and the case re-verified

cases.title: Create succeeds but add-blocking-link fails: partial state surfaced, gate not falsely passable, link-only retry succeeds
preconditions: TC-024 is failed with notes; the github-com plugin is active
The add-blocking-link step is configured to fail transiently

steps.instruction: Click 'File fix issue & block gate' while the link step is set to fail

observations.expected: Fix issue WU-041 / #452 is created successfully
A 'Link step failed' warning is shown, distinct from a full success
A 'Retry link only' action is presented and the gate is NOT passable (known partial-failure state)

steps.instruction: Restore normal conditions and click 'Retry link only'

observations.expected: The blocking link completes; WU-041 (#452) now blocks WU-040 (#451)
The warning clears and a new audit entry records the successful link retry

cases.title: Filing a fix issue with empty notes is rejected with a validation message
preconditions: TC-024 is marked failed; the fix-issue panel is open with the Notes field empty

steps.instruction: Leave Notes blank and click 'File fix issue & block gate'

observations.expected: Submission is blocked with an inline validation message that notes are required
No tracker call is made and no issue is created
The gate state is unchanged
